system.description:
Move, bitch. Get out the way.

– Ludacris, Move Bitch

Terrifying sentinels of heavy metal armor that use shields to devastate Enemies. Vanguards are mobile bastions of fortitude and might.

Iconic Vanguards

  • Groot, Guardians of the Galaxy
  • Havel, Dark Souls series
  • Juggernaut, X-Men
  • Reinhardt, Overwatch

Playing Vanguard

The vanguard is a high defense tank, trading off raw damage output for massive control and defense. This class grants you the ability to more actively tank by focusing on defending through the Rush action and shoving.

Action: Shove (Attack)
Move: Frontline
Starting Pack: Sentinel
Key Stat: Might
Complexity: ★★★☆☆

Training

Weapons: Melee
Skills: Brawl and 3 from either Detect, Leadership, Medicine, or Survival

Class Features

Level

levelFeatures.name: Stalwart
levelFeatures.description: You gain the Protector Perk (p. 71) and, when you take the Hold Action, you can use the held Action or Move as late as the end of your next Turn.

levelFeatures.name: Guard
levelFeatures.description: Once per Round, you can try to Shove a Close Target (no Action) when they become Close to you, or if you successfully Block their Attack.

levelFeatures.name: Rampant Charge
levelFeatures.description: You can push Targets you Shove ahead of you while you Move during the same Turn, shoving it Prone when you stop or push it into an occupied space. If you push it into an occupied space, it deals your weapon's damage to the Target and whatever occupied the space.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Wall (Large)
levelFeatures.description: You are considered Large for Shoves.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Unstoppable
levelFeatures.description: If you use Rampant Charge and push a Being into another Being, you can make another shove attempt to push the additional Being ahead of you as well.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Wall (Huge)
levelFeatures.description: You are considered Huge for Shoves.

levelFeatures.name: Perk
levelFeatures.description: Choose a new Perk. You must meet the prerequisites to take it, unless the Perk is granted through a Class Feature.

levelFeatures.name: Indestructible
levelFeatures.description: While you aren't Incapacitated and have an Armor Rating of 1 or more, you are Immune to Physical damage.
